description: Module function signatures are inconsistent across darwin-modules. Examples: brave.nix uses {config, lib, user, ...}, secretive.nix uses {config, user, lib, ...}, karabiner.nix uses {config, lib, machine, ...}. CLAUDE.md recommends {config, lib, pkgs, user, machine, ...}. Standardize all ~45 modules to follow this order. Also standardize 'with lib;' usage (28 files have it, 4 don't despite using lib functions).
title: Standardize module parameter order across darwin-modules
